name: daily-fresh fetch: --skip-fresh flag bypasses the gate per §2.17 but logs the bypass to C-4 audit log
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --source-id x --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --skip-fresh --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" && grep "skip-fresh" .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
